papers_mined.title: Memoria Oral Mapuche Cantos Ülkantun (Resonancias)
papers_mined.note: Mapuche ülkantun chants as oral memory of 19th-20th century occupation; orality as past-source; categories: lamngen (love), machi ül (healing), ngünülün (elegy), pichiche ül (lullaby), weichapegüm ül (epic).

papers_mined.title: Why Mapuche Sing Academia.edu
papers_mined.note: Mapuche use song as memory-passage system across generations; explicit damping of recent in favor of older lineage.

papers_mined.title: Mapuche Songs Ancestral Orality VisitLatinAmerica
papers_mined.note: Songs carry lineage + memory + ancestral knowledge with structured damping decay across temporal axis.

papers_mined.title: Mapudungun (Wikipedia)
papers_mined.note: Mapudungun language with rich oral memory tradition + ülkantun song corpus.

papers_mined.title: Memory Curse Expanded Recall Erodes Cooperation LLM (2605.08060)
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: context expansion systematically fails in multi-agent dilemmas; cooperation degrades in 18/28 settings.

papers_mined.title: Human-Like Remembering Forgetting LLM ACT-R Architecture
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: ACT-R-inspired memory architecture with decay parameters controlling base-level activation.

papers_mined.title: Proactive Interference Working Memory LLM Beyond Context (OpenReview)
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: proactive-interference paradigm; LLM retrieval accuracy declines log-linearly with co-referenced interference.

papers_mined.title: Context Window RAM Not Storage 2026
